text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I stretch for five minutes, then drink a glass of water and have a light breakfast of oatmeal and fruit. My work starts at 9 a.m., and I usually take a short break at noon for lunch. After finishing at 5 p.m., I go for a 30-minute run or do yoga at home. In the evening, I cook dinner, read a book, or call my family. I try to be in bed by 10:30 p.m. This routine helps me stay healthy and productive every day.
